title: AMFUN Pest Sticky Pads Trap, 5 Packs Pest Sticky Glue Pad Mat, Extra Strong Glue Trap Pads for Multi Pests, Multi-Use Long Sticky Traps Glue Pads Board for Indoor/Outdoor/Kitchen/Garden/Home, 1.2M
bullet_points: ✅✅【Super Strong Pest Sticky Glue Pad Mat】You will receive 5 packs of Pest Sticky Glue Pad Mat, size 120cm*27.3cm. You can cut the adhesive film as needed. Pest Sticky Glue Pad Mat is easy to use and can be placed in strategic areas where pests may be found. Once trapped, pests cannot escape, which is the safest and most effective way to keep your home clean.

🟢🟢【Easy to Use】Separate the two sides of the Pest Sticky Glue Pad Mat, put some bait such as bread crumbs, peanuts, fruits, sugar, etc. on the Pest Sticky Glue Pad Mat, and then put it in places where pests often appear. Note: Please keep these tapes out of the reach of infants and young children. To ensure its effectiveness, please use it in a dust-free place and avoid direct sunlight.

♻️♻️【Safe and Non-Toxic】Safe and non-toxic Sticky Traps Glue Pads Boards can not only effectively reduce pest infestation, but also ensure the safety of your home. These Sticky Traps Glue Pads Boards adopt a non-toxic formula that is harmless to humans and pets, making it a safe and reliable pest control solution.

🟩🟩【For All Places】Multi-use Sticky Traps Glue Pads Boards can be placed in different locations, including kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and storage rooms. Extra strong glue trap pads hold pests securely in place, preventing them from spreading and infecting other areas, helping to maintain a clean, pest-free environment. Choosing these glue traps can effectively control a pest infestation in your home!

⚠️⚠️【Service Guarantee】We firmly believe that AMFUN extra strong glue trap pads must be your perfect choice! If you have any questions about our products, please don't worry! You can contact us via email at any time, and we promise to give you a satisfactory reply within 24 hours.
